svg.text: RailRL end-to-end framework for explainable railway route-setting decisions
From operational feed acquisition to leak-controlled offline RL, evaluation, and decision-support evidence

text.tspan: SET decisions from panel requests; WAIT
candidates for the focal train and signal
HGT encoder over tracks, signals, routes,
Transformer encoder over the last K=256
Schedule outlook, scalar state, and special
CQL training with route/time auxiliary heads

svg.text: Dataset scale: 14 months | 11.8M TD records | 247k movement records | about 2.0M decisions | 1.996M usable MDP snapshots
Editable SVG: shapes and labels can be modified directly
